subcodes.title: Words to an army commander, spoken on 1914-05-12
subcodes.first_line: The editors of the Newspapers are the guardians of the rights of man. They are the champions of the poor and the protectors of the Wronged ones.
subcodes.subjects: @newspapers and the media; publications, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @unity; oneness of humanity, @service to others; to the Cause of God
